tutorials.title: Value, Bang, and Set
tutorials.summary: Learn Max-style value node control semantics.
tutorials.description: Shows how in, set, and bang change a stored value and when the value output emits.

tutorials.title: Toggle, Message, and String
tutorials.summary: Compare stateful values with event-triggered messages.
tutorials.description: Demonstrates boolean toggles, saved string values, and message-style event output.

tutorials.title: Dynamic Shader Inputs
tutorials.summary: Connect typed value nodes to annotation-generated shader inputs.
tutorials.description: Uses shader annotations to expose typed inputs, then drives those inputs from value nodes.

tutorials.title: Shader Diagnostics
tutorials.summary: Inspect a shader with an intentional annotation error.
tutorials.description: Shows how invalid shader interface annotations surface as structured diagnostics.

tutorials.title: Object Routing Panel Controls
tutorials.summary: Route typed panel controls through object-owned sendName channels.
tutorials.description: Shows ui.slider-float and ui.toggle owning sendName routing directly while a fullscreen shader consumes explicit cable inputs.
